subject: Nessa, Galar Gym Leader of Hulbury, posing in fashion-model stance against a coastal lighthouse backdrop
description: A dark-skinned young woman stands centered on the card, weight on one hip in a fashion-model contrapposto, one hand lifted near the side of her head. She has very long indigo-teal hair worked into a thick braid that falls past her waist, with shorter bangs framing her face. Her outfit reads as competitive swimwear crossed with runway styling: a blue-and-yellow halter top with fishnet-mesh paneling at the midriff, dark navy capri leggings with cutout detailing along the legs, and a chunky yellow choker. She gazes forward with a calm, self-assured expression. Behind her, a tall blue-and-white horizontally-striped lighthouse rises on the left and a second smaller tower stands at right, both flanking a calm aqua sea under a sky of streaked pale clouds. The card frame is the Trainer-Supporter layout in slate blue.
foreground: Nessa standing in three-quarter contrapposto pose
background: coastal scene with two lighthouse structures flanking a calm sea and partly cloudy sky
